main.description: Get the current user's permissions for a repository. Requires auth.

repo.description: The handle or DID of the repository to check permissions for.

permissions.description: The user's current permissions for this repository.

accessType.description: The type of access the user has to this repository.

grantedBy.description: The DID of the user who granted these permissions (if shared access).

grantedAt.description: Timestamp when the permissions were granted (if shared access).

errors.name: RepositoryNotFound
errors.description: The specified repository could not be found.
